package rulecoverage

func NegativeUrlParseInLoopOnInvariantBase() string {
    ruleID := "url_parse_in_loop_on_invariant_base"
    family := "hot_path"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "url.Parse(...) or ParseRequestURI(...) observed inside loops with a stable-looking base input."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
